title: Every single bank will soon need to hold digital assets, says Zodia CEO Julian Sawyer
Rare physical bitcoin worth $1.78 million gets cashed in after 12 years
Binance to end NFT support on exchange, shift service to wallet
summary: Binance exchange said it will move NFT support from its exchange to its non-custodial wallet and offered users 30 days to migrate their NFTs.

title: Kraken parent Payward brings tokenized IPO access to retail investors
summary: Kraken and xStocks Alliance will let eligible users seek allocations in US IPOs at the offering price through tokenized shares in coming weeks.

title: Gold Slips as Middle East Tensions Keep Inflation Risks Elevated
summary: Gold declined as renewed clashes in the Middle East cast doubt over a US-Iran peace deal, keeping energy prices elevated and inflation concerns high.

title: Private Credit Faces ‘Pipeline of Defaults,’ Holly Kim Says
summary: Glendon Capital co-founder Holly Kim explains why the private credit industry stands to see a big “backlog of defaults” away from any economic dislocations or any other inflation-related economic inputs. She speaks at the Bloomberg Global Credit Forum in New York. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Lava Card Launches Secured Visa Credit Card That Pays Bitcoin Rewards on Every Purchase
summary:
Bitcoin Magazine

Lava Card Launches Secured Visa Credit Card That Pays Bitcoin Rewards on Every Purchase
Lava has launched a secured Visa credit card that lets users fund spending with cash or stablecoins while earning Bitcoin rewards on every purchase.

title: Charles Schwab Launches 24/7 Bitcoin Futures Trading on thinkorswim
summary:
Bitcoin Magazine

Charles Schwab Launches 24/7 Bitcoin Futures Trading on thinkorswim
Charles Schwab launched near-24/7 Bitcoin futures trading on thinkorswim, marking its first round-the-clock product as it deepens crypto market access.
This post Charles Schwab Launches 24/7 Bitcoin Futures Trading

title: Zcash Completes 'Most Ambitious' Network Upgrade as ZEC Resumes Recent Surge
summary: A Zcash vulnerability could have allowed double-spending within the network's flagship privacy pool, though no exploitation occurred.

title: MoonPay Brings Crypto Transactions to Claude and Codex With MoonAgents Desktop App
summary: MoonPay's new desktop app connects AI assistants to crypto wallets and blockchain services through a graphical interface.

title: Vanguard fund becomes first ETF to top $1tn in assets
summary: Rapid growth shows volume of passive money ready to buy IPOs such as SpaceX and Anthropic

title: Google parent Alphabet upsizes record-breaking equity raise to $85bn
summary: Tech giant launches first stock offering in more than two decades in effort to fund AI spending
